text:
結局おたくに甘える自分が悔しいぜ！
せめて一言、アドバイスさせてくれ！
ヴォル・ドラゴンはマグマを操るんだ。

知ってるかもしれないけど
ここはオレの顔を立てて
初めて聞いたことにしといてくれよな！

今度だけは手本を見せるんじゃなく
オレの仇討ちだと思ってや

Stings to admit, pal, but I need your help
here. But listen up, I got one warning: Vol
Dragons know how to use magma in a fight!

I realize you may know this already, but
let's be nice to my already-bruised ego here
and just pretend like it's new and very
helpful to ya.

Just this once, feel free to think of what
you're doin' not as giving me somethin' to
work toward, but as takin' revenge for me.
